title: thymus urumovii
intro: Thymus urumovii, also known as Urumov's thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thymus urumovii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Thymus urumovii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
